description_long: This is a round ashtray crafted from a dark green marble-like material with intricate white veining throughout its surface. The rim is thick and features several evenly spaced notches, designed to hold cigarettes securely. The interior is shallow and smoothly contoured, allowing for easy disposal of ash and cigarette butts. The exterior surface is highly polished, giving it a glossy, reflective finish that accentuates the natural stone pattern. The object appears solid and weighty, typical of stone or marble ashtrays found in upscale urban environments. There are no visible markings, lids, or additional decorative elements.
description: A round, dark green marble ashtray with white veining, polished finish, and multiple cigarette notches along the rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular shape, polished marble texture, and several notches along the rim.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth of the bowl and the smooth, glossy surface with visible veining.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the symmetry of the notches and the continuous marble pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted curvature of the rim and the consistent stone texture.
